description: Style NoteSemi-formal wardrobe updaters - that's what this pair from arrow is! Style it with chinos or corduroy trousers, a tonal jacket and a casual shirt to nail the Friday feel. This pair is great to class up an off-duty ensemble too!Product DetailsBlack round toed leather shoes with slip on stylingHas mat style weaving on the the region for style with a midfoot strapTongue with brand badge on it Soft footbed; upper adhered to the outsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heel and branded grooves on the forefootMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
